lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You gathered those moonflowers yourself? That took real kindness.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Kindness? I needed them. Don't mistake self-interest for virtue.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe. But you're still here, sharing a table with me.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Practical. Your coin spends same as anyone's. Don't read into it.
